title: Add --compat-auth-file to login and logout
body:
This straightforwardly inherits the feature from c/common/pkg/auth.

Minimally smoke-tested manually.

comments.body:
Smoke-tested operation and interoperability with
```console
# docker pull localhost:5000/foo
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: Head "http://localhost:5000/v2/foo/manifests/latest": no basic auth credentials
# bin/skopeo login --tls-verify=false --compat-auth-file ~/.docker/config.json localhost:5000
Username: …
Password: 
Login Succeeded!
# docker pull localhost:5000/foo
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: Head "http://localhost:5000/v2/foo/manifests/latest": no basic auth credentials
# bin/skopeo logout --compat-auth-file ~/.docker/config.json localhost:5000
Removed login credentials for localhost:5000
# docker pull localhost:5000/foo
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: Head "http://localhost:5000/v2/foo/manifests/latest": no basic auth credentials
````

Rebased on top of merged `main` branches, please review & merge.

Cc: @TomSweeneyRedHat
